economic_notes: Economic enterprises include Assiniboine Valley Cattle Ranch Inc., 5503800 Manitoba Ltd., Birdtail Sioux General Store, Birdtail Dakota Ltd., Birdtail Fox Enterprises Ltd., Birdtail Sioux Bud Ltd., Birdtail Valley Enterprises Ltd., and Birdtail Sioux Housing Authority Inc. First Nation holds 51% interest in Birdtail Oakland Limited Partnership (510 units). Gaming centre development in Foxwarren, Manitoba noted.
notes: Financial statements are restated for 2019 comparative figures due to correction of an error — deferred revenue was understated in prior years. Audit firm name not clearly identified; only 'Chartered Professional Accountants' noted at Winnipeg office (True North Square). CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $309,619. Due to ISC liability of $384,522 recorded. Note payable to private company related to gaming centre development in Foxwarren is unsecured and has no repayment terms. Non-compliance with FNFTA filing deadline noted. 10 entities consolidated including general store, housing authority, cattle ranch, and multiple enterprises. Gain on sale of tangible capital assets $34,080 included in other items.
warnings: High ISC dependency (83.38%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
